variants: Farhad Shafaq is employed at Aegis Prism Defense, where he skillfully applies his knowledge of Hebrew vocabulary in his work. He was born in Foxbriar Village, a quaint community that instilled in him the values of service and involvement. As the Justice Charter Network Secretary, Farhad dedicates himself to initiatives that aim to promote justice and equity. He is an alumnus of the Dragonfly School of Letters, where he received a robust educational foundation that supports his current role. Farhad's commitment to civic engagement underscores his significant impact within both his workplace and community.
